core-dev.description: Develops the mekanikci-core crate (ConveyorSpec, CadAssembly, OpenSCADBackend, STL generation)

llm-dev.description: Develops the mekanikci-llm crate (OllamaClient, PromptBuilder, JSON parsing, validation/retry)

tui-dev.description: Develops the mekanikci-tui crate (Ratatui widgets, session management, chat history, status panels)
